title: BSP B2C/CQE ECC capability audit
trigger: BSP source includes A733-era B2C/CQE ECC registers and capability bits near the v5p3x path.
findings: BSP B2C ECC is enabled only when DT property b2c-ecc-on is present.
BSP CQE ECC is enabled only when cqe-on and cqe-ecc-on are present.
Vendor A733 SDMMC0 DTS shows ctl-spec-caps=<0x428> but does not show b2c-ecc-on, cqe-on, or cqe-ecc-on for sdc0.
ECC IRQ setup is conditional on those ECC capability bits.
CQE-specific paths and the CQE 32-bit DMA mask do not apply to the current normal-IDMAC SDMMC0 CMD18 proof.

public_search.notes: Search still did not reveal a public archive hit or answer for the manually sent A733 SDMMC0 descriptor-fetch question.

reason: The BSP ECC/CQE code is either gated off by missing SDMMC0 DT booleans or belongs to CQE, while the lab failure is normal IDMAC before descriptor word 0 is consumed.
next: Do not enable B2C/CQE ECC as a descriptor-fetch guess.
Keep waiting for a maintainer/list reply or a source-backed SDMMC0 firewall/security/master-permission bit.
